query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS delivery_sales_uploads (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  periodLabel VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  periodStart TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  periodEnd TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  fileName VARCHAR(255),
  totalOrders INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalAmount INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalDiscount INT DEFAULT 0,
  netSales INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalTax INT DEFAULT 0,
  grandTotal INT DEFAULT 0,
  zomatoOrders INT DEFAULT 0,
  zomatoAmount INT DEFAULT 0,
  swiggyOrders INT DEFAULT 0,
  swiggyAmount INT DEFAULT 0,
  dineInOrders INT DEFAULT 0,
  dineInAmount INT DEFAULT 0,
  cashAmount INT DEFAULT 0,
  cardAmount INT DEFAULT 0,
  upiAmount INT DEFAULT 0,
  swiggyDineoutAmount INT DEFAULT 0,
  zomatoDineoutAmount INT DEFAULT 0,
  cgst INT DEFAULT 0,
  sgst INT DEFAULT 0,
  uploadedBy INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS delivery_item_sales (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  uploadId INT NOT NULL,
  category VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  itemName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  baseProductName VARCHAR(255),
  itemCode VARCHAR(50),
  quantity INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  amount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  periodStart TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  periodEnd TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
